headline: How The State Street (STT) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Analyst Valuation Targets
summary: State Street’s updated analyst fair value has shifted from US$148.46 to US$157.46, a change of about US$9 per share that reflects refreshed assumptions in recent models. Much of the current research conversation is about how these kinds of target moves align with a mix of higher and lower Street targets, giving you both bullish and more cautious viewpoints to consider. Read on to see how these evolving targets fit together and what to watch as the narrative around State Street develops. Stay...
